title: VASTFIRE 16W Twinkle Fiber Optic Star Ceiling Light Kit with 500pcs*9.8ft*0.75mm Bluetooth RGBW Music Activated for Home and Media Movie Room Decor
features: High Quality LED Fiber Optic Light Guide Lighting Kit:Quantity:500pcs,Diameter:0.75mm,Length:9.8ft.Fiber cable harnesses are made of PMMA plastic, non-conductive, waterproof, have perfect color rendering and a lifespan of 50,000 hours. The generator is small and compact and can be easily hidden in the car.

Unique Twinkle design for the car with starry sky - The twinkle effect resembles the breathing effect, as if in a real starry sky millions of stars around you. Imagine how romantic this atmosphere would be if you were with your best friends! In addition, the twinkle mode can switch to the rhythm of the music and be controlled via app or remote control.

Remote Control & BT Remote Control:16 static colors (red, green, blue, yellow, mixed white, pure white, cyan, purple, etc) + 5 dynamic switching modes (Fade, Jump, Flash, Breathing, Music), you can also use the brightness and speed adjustment mode.

Widely Used Sky Car Fiber Light - Decorate anywhere you want to share love and romance with your friends or family. More suitable for car, cinema, boys and girls bedroom, dining room, party or festival gift.
If you have any problems, you can contact us at any time! We are an extremely responsible and professional team. It is a great joy and honour to help you and solve your problems.
description: Product Description VASTFIRE 16W Twinkle Effect Starlight Headliner Light for Car Why should you choose our fiber optic headlights? 8 static colors (mixed white, pure white, red, green, blue, yellow, ice blue, pink + DIY color), jumping, fading, twinkling with four speeds, brightness and mode speed adjustable. Control the alternator remotely or via a Bluetooth connection application. Application control: more than 16 million static colors, 1.100% sound sensitivity and dimming function adjustment, 20 dynamic modes, etc. 16 W High brightness and energy saving, safe and durable Specially Twinkle effect 16 millions colors available Widely use How to install the fiber optic light? 1. Mark star points of the pattern you want. 2. Drill holes vertically of the points you marked. 3.Insert fibers about 10cm into the board.Then fix with hot melt adhesive or glass cement. 4.Straighten and tied up fibers in small bundles to avoid tangled. (Tips :better to count the quantity and the length of the fiber in advance before insert then into holes.And mark which bunch use at which area.) 5. Connect and power on yo test.Clip off the excess length from beneath with nail clippers and finish installation. Tips: Make sure where you want to place the light enginee.It should be a place can get power easily,convenient for maintenance and keep ventilated. Fiber length you need=length from LED light engine to the star light point+30~40cm(for some slight tangle that you may can not avoid.For the fiber length to insert into LED light engine.) Do not press or tread on the fiber while installing. It is not a small project to install. but after installed,you will know it is worth and suprise. Specification: Material: Aluminum alloy Power: 16W LED chip: RGBW LED Remote control: Rf 28key remote control Input voltage: 12V Remote control type: Wireless RF Optic fibre specification 500pcs*0,75mm*3m
